summary: The retrieved evidence contains no information regarding teplizumab’s effectiveness for diabetes prevention; instead, all findings relate exclusively to teprotumumab, a pharmacologically unrelated medication. Therefore, within the scope of these documented sources, teplizumab lacks support as a preventive therapy for diabetes.\boxed{B}
